confidence_rationale: Clear view of all object transfers and placements. All 6 objects appear to be successfully transferred in both directions. No visible drops or missed placements. Completion time estimated from first instrument movement to final object placement.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with smooth, efficient transfers. Excellent midair handoff technique and consistent peg placement. Total time of 45 seconds places this in the expert range.
strengths: Smooth midair transfers with no visible drops
